target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows 75-100% of the building's structural mass is collapsed or reduced to rubble; remaining sections are heavily fragmented with no intact load-bearing walls or structural framing visible; consistent with destroyed category per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building is confirmed destroyed, one military vehicle is confirmed undamaged, and one military vehicle is confirmed damaged.
